title: goniophlebium korthalsii
intro: Goniophlebium korthalsii, also known as the Korthals' maidenhair fern, is a species of fern in the family Polypodiaceae. It is native to tropical regions of Asia and has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, treating wounds, and soothing digestive issues, due to its high content of flavonoids and other bioactive compounds. Goniophlebium korthalsii is often prepared as an herbal tea or infused in water to be consumed for its medicinal purposes.
